title: 10 best herbal essential oils for hyperthyroidism
intro_desc: Herbal essential oils for hyperthyroidism are a natural and holistic approach to managing this condition, which is characterized by an overactive thyroid gland. These oils help to balance thyroid hormones and alleviate symptoms such as anxiety, weight loss, and rapid heartbeat. Some of the best herbal essential oils for hyperthyroidism include Astragalus membranaceus, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Schisandra chinensis, Withania somnifera, Silybum marianum, Panax ginseng, Lavandula angustifolia, Bacopa monnieri, Boswellia serrata, and Cinchona officinalis. If left untreated, hyperthyroidism can lead to exhaustion, hair loss, and a weakened immune system, negatively impacting daily life and overall well-being.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Thyme essential oils helps with hyperthyroidism because of its natural ability to calm an overactive thyroid gland. The oil's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce swelling in the thyroid gland, which can alleviate symptoms such as rapid heartbeat and anxiety. Additionally, thyme's antioxidant-rich composition helps neutralize free radicals that contribute to inflammation, promoting a healthy balance in the body's metabolic processes. By using thyme essential oils, individuals with hyperthyroidism may experience a reduction in symptoms and an improved overall well-being.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Thyme essential oil's antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals that can damage thyroid tissue and exacerbate hyperthyroidism symptoms, promoting a healthy thyroid function.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Thyme essential oil's anti-inflammatory properties reduce inflammation in the body, which is often associated with hyperthyroidism, helping to alleviate symptoms such as joint pain and swelling.

Antimicrobial Properties: Thyme essential oil's antimicrobial properties help combat infections that can trigger or exacerbate hyperthyroidism, promoting a healthy immune response and reducing the risk of complications.
remedy_parts: Roots: Thyme roots have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in reducing inflammation associated with hyperthyroidism.
Leaves: Thyme leaves contain antioxidants and volatile compounds that help regulate thyroid function and alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh thymus vulgaris leaves and stems in the early morning.
Dry the harvested plant material using shade drying or dehydrator methods.
Steam distill the dried thymus vulgaris plant material at 100°c for 3 hours.
Filter the resulting essential oil through a coffee filter to remove impurities.
Transfer the filtered essential oil to dark glass bottles and store in a cool place.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Milk thistle essential oils helps with hyperthyroidism because of its ability to support liver function and reduce inflammation. The liver plays a crucial role in processing thyroid hormones, and an imbalance can contribute to hyperthyroidism symptoms. Milk thistle's silymarin compounds help protect the liver from damage, allowing it to effectively clear excess hormones from the bloodstream. Additionally, milk thistle oil has anti-inflammatory properties that may help alleviate symptoms such as rapid heart rate, anxiety, and weight loss associated with hyperthyroidism.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant: Milk Thistle Essential Oil contains antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals, which can damage thyroid cells and contribute to hyperthyroidism.

Anti-inflammatory: The oil's anti-inflammatory properties may help reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland and surrounding tissues, which can alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as pain and swelling.

Adaptogenic: Milk Thistle Essential Oil is believed to have adaptogenic effects, helping the body adapt to stress and potentially regulating thyroid hormone production to address hyperthyroidism symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, roots are used to create essential oils that help alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism such as anxiety and fatigue.

Seeds: High in silymarin, a powerful antioxidant that protects the liver from damage caused by thyroid hormones, seeds are used to create essential oils that support liver function and detoxification.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry silybum marianum flowers in bulk for subsequent extraction.
Prepare silybum marianum herbal extract using solvents or co2 methods.
Distill the herbal extract to produce silybum marianum essential oil.
Filter and bottle the silybum marianum essential oil.
Quality control and storage of silybum marianum essential oil.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ashwagandha essential oils helps with hyperthyroidism because they contain adaptogenic properties that help regulate thyroid function, reducing symptoms such as rapid heartbeat, weight loss, and anxiety. The oil's ability to calm the nervous system also alleviates stress, a common exacerbating factor for hyperthyroidism. Additionally, ashwagandha essential oils' antioxidant properties help reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland, promoting overall wellness and hormone balance. By incorporating this oil into one's daily routine, individuals with hyperthyroidism may experience improved symptoms and quality of life.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic: Ashwagandha oil helps the body adapt to stress, which can be beneficial for hyperthyroid patients who often experience anxiety and stress due to thyroid hormone imbalances.

Anti-inflammatory: Ashwagandha's anti-inflammatory properties may help reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland and surrounding tissues, which can alleviate symptoms such as pain and swelling associated with hyperthyroidism.

Antioxidant: Ashwagandha oil's antioxidant activity helps protect the body from free radical damage caused by excessive thyroid hormone production, which can contribute to oxidative stress and cellular damage.

Seeds: Containing high levels of antioxidants and fatty acids, ashwagandha seeds help to soothe inflammation and promote relaxation, alleviating anxiety and stress associated with hyperthyroidism.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 10 grams of dried ashwagandha roots and 5 grams of dried leaves from organic farms or local markets.
Dry the ingredients in a low-temperature oven at 60°c for 24 hours to prevent degradation.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder and mix with 100ml of carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil.
Heat the mixture at 70°c for 2 hours, then filter it through cheesecloth to remove impurities and separate the essential oil.
Store the resulting withania somnifera essential oil in dark glass bottles with tight-fitting lids and keep it in a cool place for up to 6 months.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh passiflora incarnata leaves and stems in the morning after dew has evaporated, avoiding contaminated areas.
Dry the harvested plant material using shade drying method for 7-10 days, ensuring even drying to prevent mold growth.
Steam distill the dried plant material using a clevenger apparatus at 100°c temperature and 1 bar pressure, collecting essential oil for 4 hours.
Filter the essential oil using paper filters or cheesecloth to remove impurities, followed by decantation to separate sediment from clear oil, taking approximately 30 minutes.
Store the filtered passiflora incarnata essential oil in dark glass bottles with tight-fitting lids, away from direct sunlight and heat sources, for up to 6 months.

Combine the distilled essential oil with a carrier oil such as jojoba or sweet almond oil in a ratio of 1:3.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat hyperthyroidism with herbal essential oils is to blend Lemon (Citrus limonum) and Thyme (Thymus vulgaris) essential oils. The antithyroid properties of Lemon oil help reduce thyroid hormone production, while Thyme oil's natural anti-inflammatory properties soothe the thyroid gland. Use 3-5 drops of each oil in a carrier oil and massage onto the neck or chest three times a day for optimal results. Always dilute essential oils with a carrier oil and consult with a healthcare professional before use.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to hyperthyroidism that are treated with herbal essential oils are conditions such as adrenal fatigue, thyroiditis, and hypothyroidism. Collect the essential oil from the distillation process and separate it from the hydrosol by decantation.

Caryophyllene oxide: Displays anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland and alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Lavender flowers are primarily used due to their calming and sedative properties, which can help alleviate anxiety and promote relaxation, often associated with hyperthyroidism symptoms.
Leaves: Lavender leaves are used for their slightly different chemical composition, which can provide a milder sedative effect while still promoting relaxation and reducing stress.

Stems: Lavender stems contain a higher concentration of certain compounds like linalool, which has been shown to have a balancing effect on the thyroid gland and may help alleviate hyperthyroidism symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest the fresh flowers of lavandula angustifolia at dawn when their fragrance is most intense and potent.
Steam distill the harvested flowers at a temperature of 100-105 degrees celsius for 2-3 hours.
Collect the distilled water and essential oil mixture and allow it to separate into two distinct layers.
Filter the essential oil layer through a coffee filter paper or a centrifuge to remove any impurities.
Store the extracted lavandula angustifolia essential oil in a dark glass bottle with a tight-fitting lid.

remedies.remedy_desc: Bacopa monnieri essential oils helps with hyperthyroidism because of its adaptogenic properties that help regulate the body's response to stress, which is often a contributing factor to thyroid issues. The oil is rich in bacosides, which have been shown to support thyroid function by increasing the production of thyroid-stimulating hormone (TSH) and reducing oxidative stress. Additionally, the oil's antioxidant properties help protect the thyroid gland from damage, promoting overall thyroid health and potentially alleviating symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism.
remedy_constituents: Bacosides: Bacosides have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate the oxidative stress and inflammation associated with hyperthyroidism.
Bacopasides: Bacopasides may help regulate thyroid function and reduce the production of thyroid hormones, contributing to a decrease in hyperthyroid symptoms.
Triterpenoid saponins: Triterpenoid saponins can modulate the immune system and reduce inflammation, which can help mitigate the autoimmune responses that contribute to hyperthyroidism.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are the primary source of essential oils in Bacopa monnieri due to their high concentration of active compounds.
Flowers: They contribute to the essential oil's therapeutic properties, particularly in relation to the management of hyperthyroidism symptoms.
Stems: The stems are another significant source of essential oils, containing compounds that help regulate thyroid function and alleviate associated symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of dried bacopa monnieri leaves and flowers at the peak of their potency and aroma.
Steam distill the harvested bacopa monnieri leaves and flowers using a clevenger apparatus for 2-3 hours.
Collect the distilled essential oil and separate it from the water using a separation funnel and filter papers.
Store the extracted bacopa monnieri essential oil in a dark glass bottle with a tight-fitting lid and refrigerate at 4-8 degrees celsius.
Use the extracted bacopa monnieri essential oil within 6 months of preparation and in a dilution ratio of 2-3 drops per 10ml of carrier oil.

remedies.remedy_desc: Boswellia serrata essential oils helps with hyperthyroidism because of its anti-inflammatory properties that reduce swelling and pain associated with thyroid issues. It also exhibits antioxidant properties, which can help stabilize thyroid function by reducing oxidative stress and promoting a healthy balance of thyroid hormones. Additionally, the essential oil's ability to improve circulation and reduce inflammation may help alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism, such as rapid heartbeat and tremors, promoting overall thyroid health and well-being.
remedy_constituents: Terpineol: This terpene constituent helps to reduce inflammation and modulate the immune system, which can contribute to the development of hyperthyroidism.
A boswellic acid: This triterpenoid constituent has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help mitigate the oxidative stress and inflammation associated with hyperthyroidism.

Fern- like sesquiterpene: Also known as incensole acetate, it helps to modulate the hypothalamic-pituitary-thyroid axis, which can help regulate thyroid function and alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are rich in boswellic acids, which help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism.
Rhyzomes: They contain boswellic acids and other compounds that help regulate thyroid function and reduce oxidative stress.
Barks: They are a good source of boswellic acids and flavonoids, which help to calm the thyroid gland and reduce symptoms of hyperthyroidism.
remedy_recipe: Harvest boswellia serrata resin from mature trees in late winter or early spring when resin is most abundant.
Dry the harvested resin in a warm dry place for 7 to 10 days to reduce moisture content.
Steam distill the dried resin using a steam distillation apparatus for 2 to 3 hours to release essential oil.
Collect the essential oil and separate it from water using a separation apparatus for 30 minutes to 1 hour.
Filter the collected essential oil through a filter paper to remove impurities and sediment for 10 to 15 minutes.

remedies.remedy_desc: Cinchona officinalis essential oils helps with hyperthyroidism because it contains quinine and other bioactive compounds that have a balancing effect on the thyroid gland. The oil's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to hyperthyroidism symptoms. Additionally, Cinchona officinalis essential oil's ability to regulate cortisol levels and promote relaxation may help alleviate anxiety and stress, common symptoms associated with hyperthyroidism. Its natural properties make it a potential complementary therapy for managing the condition.
remedy_constituents: Quinic acid: Helps reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland, which can contribute to hyperthyroidism symptoms.
Quinine: Exhibits anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism, such as rapid heartbeat and anxiety.
Quinovic acid: Demonstrates a potential ability to reduce thyroid hormone production, thus helping to manage hyperthyroidism symptoms.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves of Cinchona officinalis are used to make essential oils due to their high content of quinine and other alkaloids that help regulate thyroid function.

Barks: The barks of Cinchona officinalis are used to make essential oils because they contain compounds like quinine and quinidine that help slow down the heart rate and reduce thyroid hormone production.
Stems: The stems of Cinchona officinalis are used to make essential oils due to their ability to inhibit the production of thyroid hormones and help regulate the body's metabolism.
